cards.name: P1: BITKRAFT Ventures - Jens Hilgers
cards.desc:
**Priority:** P1 (Highest)
**Fund:** BITKRAFT Ventures
**AUM:** $1.05B+ across 6 funds
**Stage:** Seed to Series B
**Check Size:** $2M-$5M

**Contact:**
- Name: Jens Hilgers
- Title: Founding General Partner
- Email: jens@bitkraft.vc
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/jenshilgers

**Background:** Founded ESL (esports) 2000, Co-founded G2 Esports, widely considered 'godfather of esports'

**Thesis Fit Score:** 95/100
Perfect alignment - gaming + AI infrastructure + Web3 core to mandate

**Focus Areas:** Gaming content & IP, AI infrastructure, Web3/blockchain gaming, Immersive technology (VR/AR)

**Recent Investments:**
- Cartridge: $7.5M Series A (Web3 infrastructure, Dojo engine)
- NPC Labs: $18M seed (Web3 gaming infrastructure)
- Pixion: $3M (Power Protocol for blockchain games)

**Portfolio Notables:** Immutable, Forte, Aleph.im, Mythical Games, The Sandbox

**Outreach Hook:** Following BITKRAFT's thesis on 'Synthetic Reality' - the convergence of gaming, AI, and immersive tech. Recent Cartridge/NPC Labs investments show conviction in AI-powered onchain infrastructure.

**Email Draft:** emails/bitkraft_jens_hilgers.md

cards.name: P2: Konvoy Ventures - Jackson Vaughan
cards.desc:
**Priority:** P2
**Fund:** Konvoy Ventures
**AUM:** $150M (Fund III, 2024)
**Stage:** Seed to Series A
**Check Size:** $500K-$3M

**Contact:**
- Name: Jackson Vaughan
- Title: Managing Partner & Co-Founder
- Email: jackson@konvoy.vc
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/jacksonvaughan

**Background:** NYU Stern, previously Whim CEO, board member at Carry1st and StageZero

**Thesis Fit Score:** 92/100
Strong alignment - thesis explicitly covers AR/VR, crypto, esports, and gaming platforms

**Focus Areas:** Gaming platforms & technology, AR/VR immersive tech, Crypto/Web3 gaming, Esports infrastructure

**Recent Investments:**
- Edgegap: Series A (AI-powered game server orchestration)
- Gamefam: Growth (Roblox gaming platform)
- Carry1st: Series A extension (Mobile gaming publisher - Africa)

**Portfolio Notables:** Sky Mavis (Axie Infinity), Overwolf, Pandascore, Nodwin Gaming

**Outreach Hook:** Konvoy's thesis on 'frontier of gaming' directly aligns with AI infrastructure play. Edgegap investment shows conviction in AI-powered gaming backend infrastructure.

**Email Draft:** emails/konvoy_jackson_vaughan.md

cards.name: P3: a16z Speedrun - Troy Kirwin
cards.desc:
**Priority:** P3
**Fund:** a16z Speedrun (Accelerator + Seed)
**AUM:** $180M+ deployed
**Stage:** Pre-seed to Seed
**Check Size:** $750K-$1M

**Contact:**
- Name: Troy Kirwin
- Title: Partner & Cohort Lead
- Email: troy@a16z.com
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/troykirwin

**Background:** Ex-Unity, leads a16z speedrun cohorts, focuses on B2B AI and creative tech

**Thesis Fit Score:** 90/100
Very strong - explicitly invests at intersection of TECH x GAMES (AI/infra, 3D tools, VR/AR, web3 games)

**Focus Areas:** AI x Games infrastructure, 3D tools & simulations, VR/AR/XR, Web3 gaming, Creative tech

**Recent Investments:**
- k-ID: Seed (AI-powered gaming compliance)
- Backflip: Seed (AI game development tools)
- 150+ startups across 3 cohorts (2023-2025)

**Program:** SR006 applications open, SF-based Jan-Apr 2026

**Outreach Hook:** SR006 applications just opened but we're raising now. Explicit mandate is 'TECH x GAMES' - AI/infra, 3D tools, VR/AR, web3 games.

**Email Draft:** emails/a16z_speedrun_troy_kirwin.md

cards.name: P4: London Venture Partners - David Lau-Kee
cards.desc:
**Priority:** P4
**Fund:** London Venture Partners (LVP)
**AUM:** $140M+
**Stage:** Seed
**Check Size:** $500K-$2M

**Contact:**
- Name: David Lau-Kee
- Title: Co-Founder & General Partner
- Email: dlk@londonvp.com
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/davidlaukee

**Background:** Founded Criterion Software (RenderWare engine, Burnout), early investor in Supercell and Unity, 25+ years gaming industry

**Thesis Fit Score:** 88/100
Strong - exclusively invests in gaming ecosystem including tech/platforms/infrastructure

**Focus Areas:** Game studios & content, Gaming technology platforms, Gaming infrastructure, Interactive entertainment

**Recent Investments:**
- Rule: £800K pre-seed (Save-to-win mobile game - fintech x gaming)
- Various gaming infrastructure seed deals (2024-2025)

**Portfolio Notables:** Supercell (early), Unity (early), Super Evil Megacorp, Wargaming

**Outreach Hook:** LVP was early to Supercell and Unity - understand gaming infrastructure before others. Building the AI infrastructure layer that every game studio will need.

**Email Draft:** emails/lvp_david_lau_kee.md

cards.name: P5: The Venture Reality Fund - Tipatat Chennavasin
cards.desc:
**Priority:** P5
**Fund:** The Venture Reality Fund (VRF)
**AUM:** ~$50M+
**Stage:** Seed to Series A
**Check Size:** $100K-$500K

**Contact:**
- Name: Tipatat Chennavasin
- Title: Co-Founder & General Partner
- Email: tipatat@thevrfund.com
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/tipatat

**Background:** Stanford BS, created VR/AR content, became convinced of VR power after curing fear of heights while developing in VR

**Thesis Fit Score:** 85/100
Good - specializes in AI & Spatial Computing, VR/AR, and immersive tech for gaming/enterprise

**Focus Areas:** AI & Spatial Computing, VR/AR/MR, Immersive gaming, Metaverse/Web3, Intelligent computing

**Recent Investments:**
- Oasiz: $2.5M seed (TikTok meets Roblox)
- Little Umbrella: Seed (Death by AI social game)
- Gracia AI: $1.2M (Photorealistic volumetric spatial videos)

**Portfolio Notables:** Spatial, Littlstar, 8th Wall (acquired by Niantic)

**Outreach Hook:** VRF's focus on 'AI & Spatial Computing' for immersive gaming aligns with our vision. Gracia AI investment shows conviction in AI-generated spatial content.

**Email Draft:** emails/vrf_tipatat_chennavasin.md
